bannerSubtitle: Refreshing flavors crafted for the season

sections.title: Festival Cakes
sections.subtitle: Celebrate every festival with our special edition cakes

items.name: Diwali Celebration Cake
items.description: A grand celebration cake adorned with edible diyas, rangoli patterns, and gold leaf. Available in Kaju Katli and Gulab Jamun flavored layers.

items.name: Eid Mubarak Cake
items.description: A beautifully decorated crescent moon and star cake with rose and pistachio flavors. Perfect for Eid celebrations.

sections.title: Holiday Specials
sections.subtitle: Limited-edition treats for the holiday season

items.name: Mango Season Cake
items.description: Fresh Alphonso mango cream cake — our most loved summer creation. Made with 100% real Alphonso mangoes.

items.name: Christmas Plum Cake
items.description: A rich, moist Christmas fruit cake soaked in rum and loaded with dry fruits, nuts, and warm spices. Made months in advance for the perfect flavor.

sections.title: Wedding Cakes
sections.subtitle: Make your special day unforgettable with our bespoke wedding cakes

items.name: Classic 3-Tier Wedding Cake
items.description: Elegant white fondant 3-tier cake with sugar roses, pearl beading, and gold ribbon. Customizable flavors and design.

items.name: Floral Garden Cake (2-tier)
items.description: Rustic 2-tier wedding cake adorned with fresh edible flowers, lush greenery, and a naked cake aesthetic. Perfect for garden weddings.

sections.title: Birthday Packages
sections.subtitle: Complete party packages to make every birthday magical

items.name: Kids Birthday Package
items.description: Princess/Superhero theme 1kg cake + 12 themed cupcakes + 24 butter cookies. Comes with free candles and birthday card.

items.name: Premium Adult Birthday Package
items.description: Custom 2kg designer cake + 24 cupcakes + Belgian Chocolate Truffles (12 pcs) + Choco Chip Cookies (24 pcs). Premium packaging included.
